nouns.summary: The text states that Jesse “ἐγέννησεν” (gave birth to) a specific person, namely David the king.
The text says David was born from Jesse (“Δαυὶδ ἐγέννησεν…”), and it also states that David “ἐγέννησεν” Solomon, linking Solomon’s birth to “τοῦ Οὐρίου.”
“βασιλέα” specifies that the David mentioned in the text is a king, describing his status in the statement about Jesse giving birth to him.
The text asserts that Solomon is the son born by David (“Δαυὶδ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Σολομῶνα”), with the birth described as being “ἐκ τῆς τοῦ Οὐρίου.”
The text refers to “τοῦ Οὐρίου” in connection with Solomon’s birth (“ἐκ τῆς τοῦ Οὐρίου”), indicating the lineage/origin associated with Uriah for Solomon.
